tetris.name: Conservative
tetris.description: Always pick the safest pre-ranked placement. Never improvise.

tetris.name: Aggressive
tetris.description: Prioritise line clears over surface smoothness.

tetris.name: Well Filler
tetris.description: Build flat on the left, keep column 9 as a Tetris well.

scavenger.name: Cautious
scavenger.description: Always trust the BFS pathfinder. Never improvise direction.

scavenger.name: Direct
scavenger.description: Trust the bearing field; deviate only when BFS strongly disagrees.

scavenger.name: Explorer
scavenger.description: Use free `look` between moves to refresh state.
